title: Nigeria Needs 10% Annual Growth to Achieve $1 Trillion Economy Goal – UBA Boss - FinancialEDGE
description: The Group Managing Director of United Bank for Africa Plc, Mr Oliver Alawuba, has said that Nigeria must grow its economy at a minimum rate of 10 per cent annually if it hopes to achieve the $1tn gross domestic product target set by the Federal Government. Speaking on the paper "Banking Recapitalization Towards a One
html: The Group Managing Director of United Bank for Africa Plc, Mr Oliver Alawuba, has said that Nigeria must grow its economy at a minimum rate of 10 per cent annually if it hopes to achieve the $1tn gross domestic product target set by the Federal Government.
